glean.label: Glean MCP
glean.preflight_prompt: Use the Glean MCP tools to perform a harmless read-only search for a known internal page and return a one-sentence confirmation that retrieval worked.

direct.label: Atlassian (direct)
direct.preflight_prompt: Use the Atlassian MCP tools to perform a harmless read-only lookup (for example, search for a Confluence page or fetch a Jira issue) and return a one-sentence confirmation that retrieval worked.
